# Material System

> Surface properties and shader material system

**Category:** Integration · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** integration · godot

## What this does

Surface properties and shader material system

Specifies 5 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## What must be true

- **implementation:** Feature implemented in C++ engine core
- **platform_agnostic:** Works across desktop, web, mobile platforms

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Base Material Properties** — when Albedo, normal, metallic, roughness is requested, then Albedo, normal, metallic, roughness completed.
- **Shader Materials** — when Custom shader-based materials is requested, then Custom shader-based materials completed.
- **Material Parameters** — when Set and animate shader parameters is requested, then Set and animate shader parameters completed.
- **Transparency** — when Alpha blending and translucency is requested, then Alpha blending and translucency completed.
- **Special Effects** — when Parallax, clearcoat, anisotropy is requested, then Parallax, clearcoat, anisotropy completed.
